title: cymbidium goeringii var. mackinnonii
intro: Cymbidium goeringii var. mackinnonii, also known as the Himalayan cymbidium or Cymbidium mackinnonii, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cymbidium goeringii var. mackinnonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
